_comment: F5 codemod-replay skip-list (was 116, now 98). Files whose legacy type:name literals must stay legacy at the F5 codemod-replay stage. Buckets: (1) DELETED-API tests (asset-ref.test.ts, resolve-ref.test.ts) — ported/deleted in F5 step 2, not skip-listed after; (2) STATE.DB-coupled pipeline tests (improve/consolidate/proposal/reflect/distill/salience/derived) whose durable asset_salience/proposal/events keys stay legacy `type:name` built INLINE (Chunk-8 preservation) — they read those keys back through the preserved inline-legacy arms, so re-keying the literal breaks the join; (3) DURABLE-STATE survival / re-key / relink fixtures that seed LEGACY on-disk/db state as §11.4 migration INPUT; (4) ORIGIN-QUALIFIED stored-key assertions + false-positive collisions (engineFingerprint agent:claude, frontmatter mirror) that carry residual `origin//type:name` / non-ref `type:` tokens the codemod cannot rewrite (F3 hand bucket). The F5 codemod replay FREED 27 files that F4b (displayRef short-conceptId) / F4c (usage-event re-key) made new-grammar-safe; 18 of those had zero residual legacy tokens and came off this list, 9 (graph/history/show/source-clone/usage-events-queries/lint-mv-ref-dual-grammar/feedback-command/source/env-path-run) kept because they still carry origin-qualified tokens (hand bucket). The old grammar deletion (F5 steps 3-5) retires buckets 1-2 further. | F5j (98→97): the 9 origin-qualified F3 files had their CLI-arg/API ref INPUTS hand-re-keyed to the conceptId grammar (origin-qualified inputs now flow through parseQualifiedRefInput / parseStoredRef); they STAY skip-listed for their DURABLE-STATE / persisted / echoed legacy assertions (bucket 3-style), not the origin tokens. source-clone.test.ts came OFF the list — fully re-keyed to zero residual legacy tokens (its remote/path origins are non-ref path literals, not type:name). | WI-8.5d (Chunk-8): removed 25 entries that now carry ZERO legacy `type:name` literals (re-keyed by the WI-8.5 flip / cutover) and are no longer codemod-sensitive; kept the durable-state-survival / relink-usage-events / ref-resolver-contract / curate-golden judgments fixtures that legitimately seed legacy as §11.4 migration INPUT.
